decks.name: Travel basics
decks.description: Everyday words and phrases for getting around.

cards.prompt: Quiero comprar un billete de tren.

decks.name: Cell biology
decks.description: Organelles and the basics of the cell.

cards.prompt: The nucleus holds the cell's genetic material.

decks.name: Spring framework
decks.description: Test your knowledge on Spring framework

cards.prompt: @Profile is an example of a conditional configuration. When you annotate a component with @Profile, the component is initialized conditionally when a specified profile is active.

cards.front:
When you build a web application, you have to decide which development stack you want.
There are two types of Spring MVC applications:
  • Web Servlet (Traditional Spring MVC)
  • Web Reactive
Describe the Web Reactive development stack.
cards.back:
Web Reactive: This is the new way of building web applications using Spring WebFlux.
  • Newer, more efficient
  • Non-blocking
  • Based on the Reactive Streams API
  • Requires knowledge of reactive programming
  • Uses the DispatcherHandler to handle requests
  • Netty, Undertow, Servlet 3.1+
  • Specification
This is a placeholder for any Hibernate property that you want to set.

decks.name: World capitals
decks.description: Match countries to their capital cities.

cards.prompt: The capital of France is Paris.
The capital of Egypt is Cairo.

decks.name: JavaScript fundamentals
decks.description: Core language quirks and built-ins.

cards.prompt: Add an item to the end of an array with push.
const declares a block-scoped constant.

decks.name: Ancient Rome
decks.description: People, places and dates of the Roman world.

cards.front: Who was the first Roman emperor?
Crossing which river in 49 BC began a civil war?

cards.prompt: By legend, Rome was founded in 753 BC.

decks.name: Common Spanish verbs
decks.description: High-frequency verbs and forms.

cards.prompt: "We speak" is hablamos.
The verb ser means "to be".

decks.name: Math quick facts
decks.description: Constants, formulas and mental math.

cards.prompt: The square root of 144 is 12.
Seven times eight is 56.
